'''Khe-Jeen Slee''' was an [[Issori]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who replaced [[Koobis Nu]] as Rogue Eight in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. He was born of a [[Whoon-cha]], or inter-noble bond. The 'Khe' and 'Slee' portions of his name were chosen because the names added up to an auspicious number, while [[Jeen family|Jeen]] was the name of his mother's family.

Khe-Jeen was killed during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] campaign against [[Delak Krennel]] at the [[Battle of Distna]].

==Behind the scenes==
Khe-Jeen Slee was introduced in [[Michael A. Stackpole]]'s [[1999]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' as Rogue Eight. The [[1993]] novel ''[[The Last Command]]'' features a Rogue Eight flying in the [[Battle of Qat Chrystac]], set shortly before the events of ''Isard's Revenge'', but it has never been confirmed that Slee was already with the Rogues at that point.
